headline: Harry Wilson
body: Harry Wilson is in advanced talks over a transfer.
text:
🚨 Leeds United reach an agreement to sign Harry Wilson as a free agent.


Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Leeds have held positive talks with Harry Wilson as they look to beat off competition from Champions League clubs.

Wilson is a free agent after leaving Fulham.🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2069424183780708480#m
draft_caption:
📰 PRESS REPORTS | Gossip linking Harry Wilson with a potential switch to Fulham.
